profile.passwordTip2: Mix uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers and special characters
profile.passwordTip3: Don't use personal information as your password

users.subtitle: Manage and edit users
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

branding.title: System Branding Assets
branding.description: System default branding assets are displayed here. These assets are read-only and can only be changed manually by the developer from the public/branding folder. Use the Company Management page for company-based assets.

hints.testEmail: If left empty, will be sent to the email address in your account

templates.title: Email Templates
templates.comingSoon: Email template editing feature will be added soon

import.settingsDescription: Configure file-based product import settings from ERP and external systems.
import.autoImportHint: When enabled, files in the import directory are automatically imported at the specified interval.
import.skipErrors: Skip error rows, continue with others
import.importDirectoryHint: ERP files should be sent to this directory. Auto import scans this directory.
import.apiDocDescription: ERP systems can send import files using the API endpoint below.
import.apiAuthHint: Use the API key from the API tab.
import.apiError400: Unsupported format, size exceeded, or file missing
import.apiError403: File import is not enabled for this company
import.apiErrorDup: Same file was uploaded before (hash match)
import.apiFormatsHint: Files are automatically parsed with format detection. Field mapping is done automatically with SmartFieldMapper.
import.apiFieldMappingDesc: Column headers in your file are automatically mapped to product fields. Common examples below:
import.apiFieldMappingAuto: SmartFieldMapper automatically recognizes Turkish, English, and common ERP field names. Default mappings can be configured in settings.
import.pendingFilesDesc: Pending files in the company import directory. You can select a file to start manual import.
import.pendingFilesEmpty: No pending files in import directory.
import.defaultImportOptionsHint: These options are used as defaults when importing files. They can be changed for each import.
import.importModalDefaultsHint: Options are pre-checked with the default values from settings. You can change them for this import.
import.savedMappingsWillBeUsed: {count} saved field mappings will be used
import.noSavedMappingsAutoDetect: No saved mappings, auto-detection will be used
import.importConfirmMessage: File "{filename}" will be imported. Do you want to continue?
import.configureMappingsDesc: Define which product fields correspond to column headers in import files. You can upload a sample file for auto-detection.
import.configureMappingsHint: Enter source column names according to your file headers. Empty fields will be auto-matched using SmartFieldMapper.
import.sampleFileFailed: Sample file could not be analyzed
import.mappingDragDrop: Drag and drop your sample file here or select
import.mappingFileHint: Your file will be analyzed and column headers will be auto-detected.

mqtt.title: MQTT Broker Settings
mqtt.description: Broker connection settings for ESL devices running in MQTT mode
mqtt.infoText: MQTT is a lightweight messaging protocol for IoT devices. ESL devices running in CLIENT mode (no server ports open) receive commands and report status through the MQTT broker.
mqtt.step1: Install Mosquitto or another MQTT broker
mqtt.step2: Enter broker URL and port information
mqtt.step4: Configure devices to MQTT mode via BLE

hanshow.description: Hanshow electronic shelf label integration (ESL-Working v2.5.3 API)

pavoDisplay.title: PavoDisplay
pavoDisplay.description: PavoDisplay Android electronic price tag integration (HTTP-SERVER)
pavoDisplay.integrated: PavoDisplay integration is built-in and active

hal.title: HAL Registration System
hal.description: Republic of Turkey Ministry of Trade HAL Registration System (HKS) registration query integration
hal.enterCredentials: Enter your HAL user credentials for registration query

hints.username: Your username registered in HKS system
hints.tcVergiNo: TC ID or Tax number you want to query (optional)
hints.sifatId: Select your business title registered in HAL system
hints.howToGet: If you don't have HAL user credentials, you can register from hal.gov.tr or via E-Government.

toast.servicePasswordMissing: Service password not entered - some features may be limited

errors.SETTINGS_NOT_CONFIGURED: HAL settings not configured. Please save settings.
errors.SOAP_NOT_AVAILABLE: PHP SOAP extension not installed. Contact your server administrator.
errors.SOAP_CONNECTION_FAILED: Could not connect to HAL server. Server may not be accessible or there may be a network issue.
errors.UNEXPECTED_RESPONSE: Unexpected response received from HAL server
errors.HAL_ERROR_1: Operation failed. HAL service could not process the request.
errors.HAL_ERROR_11: User credentials incorrect. Username or password is wrong.
errors.HAL_ERROR_13: Authentication failed. Username or password is wrong.
errors.HAL_ERROR_UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

infoBox.title: About HAL Registration System
infoBox.description: HAL Registration System is the official system that tracks vegetables and fruits from production to consumption. With the registration query feature, you can view product origin, producer information and transaction history.
infoBox.apiInfo: This integration uses HAL SOAP Web Services (BildirimService).
infoBox.registerLink: Visit hal.gov.tr to register for HKS.

tamsoft.title: TAMSOFT ERP
tamsoft.description: TAMSOFT ERP system integration. Synchronize product, stock and price information.

hints.defaultDepo: Select default warehouse. Run connection test to load warehouse list.

sync.title: TAMSOFT Synchronization
sync.noDepoWarning: Please first select warehouse with "Load Warehouses".
sync.depoHint: Select warehouse to pull products from or synchronize all warehouses
sync.infoUpdate: Price and stock information of existing products are updated
sync.infoAllDepots: If "All Warehouses" is selected, products are pulled from each warehouse sequentially

payment.title: Payment System
payment.adminOnly: These settings can only be changed by SuperAdmin.

hints.apiKey: API key obtained from Iyzico panel
hints.publishableKey: Publishable Key obtained from Paynet panel
hints.environment: Select sandbox for test, production for live transactions
hints.testMode: No real transactions in test mode
hints.paynetMerchant: Public key obtained from Paynet merchant panel
hints.testModeHint: No real payment in test mode

toast.apiKeyRequired: API Key required to activate payment system
toast.secretKeyRequired: Secret Key required to activate payment system
toast.publishableKeyRequired: Publishable Key required to activate payment system

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Plan
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete the plan {name}?

weighing.title: Weighing Product Barcode
weighing.description: Barcode settings for weighed products. Flag code + scale code = 7-digit barcode.
weighing.formatHint: Barcode format to be used in designs
weighing.previewHint: Example: Flag code (27) + Scale code (09337) = 7-digit barcode (2709337)

info.title: Barcode Information
info.description: In weighed products, barcode consists of flag code and scale code combination. When weighed on scale, full barcode is generated by adding weight information.
info.note: Note: Full barcode format from scale: 27XXXXX QQ qqq + Check Digit (QQ=kg, qqq=gram)

labels.title: Label Sizes
labels.subtitle: Manage label sizes for printing
labels.infoText: System default sizes cannot be edited or deleted. You can add and manage your own custom sizes. Sizes you add will appear in the product printing screen.

form.name: Name (Optional)
form.nameHint: If left empty, will be auto-generated from dimensions
form.activeHint: Inactive sizes do not appear in printing list

labels.systemEditInfo: This is a system default size. You can only change active/inactive status.
labels.deleteConfirm: Label size "{name}" will be deleted. Do you want to continue?

gateway.title: Gateway Settings
gateway.subtitle: Gateway management for local network devices
gateway.systemDescription: You can activate or deactivate the gateway system. When inactive, content will not be sent to devices.

runtime.title: Gateway Runtime Settings
runtime.description: You can manage Worker/Gateway timeout, poll and retry backoff values from this section.
runtime.scopeCompany: Scope: Company setting. Worker and server send flows use these values.
runtime.scopeUser: Scope: User setting. Save with Admin/SuperAdmin at company scope for it to reflect in worker flow.

gateway.credentialsWarning: This information will only be shown once. Please save it in a secure place.
gateway.credentialsSecretHidden: This gateway was created before. For security reasons, secret key is only shown during creation.
gateway.deleteConfirm: Gateway "{name}" will be deleted. Do you want to continue?

empty.title: No Gateway Found
empty.description: No gateways added yet. Start by creating a new gateway.

toast.savedUserLevel: Company setting permission not found. Change saved at user level.
toast.runtimeSavedCompany: Gateway runtime settings saved at company level.
toast.runtimeSavedUser: Company setting permission not found. Settings saved at user level.

defaultImage.title: Default Image
defaultImage.description: Set the default image to be displayed when device memory is cleared. You can define different images according to screen size.
defaultImage.uploadInfo: This image will be automatically loaded when device memory is cleared. It is recommended to select an image suitable for screen size.
defaultImage.noGateways: You must first add a gateway
defaultImage.gatewayHint: This image will be displayed on devices of selected gateway
defaultImage.typeHint: Select which screen size/orientation it will be used for
defaultImage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this default image?
